items.name: base-ui-accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Accordion primitive preserving model-owned value state, single and multiple selection, disabled item behavior, Enter and Space keyboard activation, deprecated orientation data attributes, ARIA relationships, panel mounting policy, and root/item/header/trigger/panel data attributes.

items.name: base-ui-alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Alert Dialog primitive composed from the local Dialog foundation with forced modality, alertdialog popup semantics, model-owned open state, disabled outside dismissal, cancel/close facts, and consumer-owned action facts.

items.name: base-ui-autocomplete
items.title: Autocomplete
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Autocomplete primitive preserving model-owned input value, open state, highlighted item, mode-based list/both/inline/none query behavior, input-owned form value, popup/listbox ARIA, empty state, disabled/read-only states, deterministic placement attributes, and Combobox-backed filtering, collection, highlight, and selection behavior.

items.name: base-ui-avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Avatar primitive preserving root, image, fallback, modeled image loading state, status data attributes, native image props, and image load/error message hooks.

items.name: base-ui-button
items.title: Button
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Button primitive preserving native disabled, focusable disabled, non-native role, and keyboard activation semantics.

items.name: base-ui-checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Checkbox primitive preserving controlled checked, unchecked, and indeterminate states, root and indicator data attributes, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, Space keyboard activation, and native checkbox form controls without internal state.

items.name: base-ui-checkbox-group
items.title: Checkbox Group
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Checkbox Group primitive preserving controlled multi-value group semantics, parent checkbox coordination, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, root and checkbox data attributes, Space keyboard activation, and native checkbox form inputs without internal state.

items.name: base-ui-collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Collapsible primitive preserving model-owned open state, trigger activation, ARIA expanded and controls relationships, root/trigger/panel state data attributes, disabled trigger behavior, and panel mounting policy.

items.name: base-ui-combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Combobox primitive preserving model-owned open, query, value, selected values, highlighted item, highlighted chip, filtering, popup/listbox ARIA, empty state, groups, chips, chip removal, disabled and readonly states, deterministic placement attributes, and hidden form input wiring.

items.name: base-ui-context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Context Menu primitive composed from the local Menu foundation, adding model-owned context points, context-key opening, context-trigger attributes, deterministic point anchoring, and Mac/non-Mac pointer-release behavior without duplicating Menu item, submenu, checked item, radio item, or roving-focus semantics.

items.name: base-ui-dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Dialog primitive preserving model-owned open state, trigger/open/close facts, native dialog ARIA relationships, modal command helpers, backdrop and popup state data attributes, and title/description wiring.

items.name: base-ui-drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Drawer primitive composed from the local Dialog lifecycle, preserving model-owned open state, modal commands, focus and dismiss behavior, Drawer popup/content data attributes, placement direction, and model-owned indent activity.

items.name: base-ui-field
items.title: Field
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Field composition primitive preserving root, item, label, control, description, error, validity data, ARIA relationships, and validation data attributes with model-owned validation state.

items.name: base-ui-fieldset
items.title: Fieldset
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Fieldset primitive preserving native fieldset disabled behavior, explicit legend association, parent-disabled propagation, and root/legend data attributes without hidden runtime state.

items.name: base-ui-form
items.title: Form
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Form primitive preserving native form rendering, noValidate defaults, submit/reset event payloads, validation-mode metadata, disabled/invalid data attributes, and model-owned validation/submission flow composed with local Field semantics.

items.name: base-ui-input
items.title: Input
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Input primitive preserving native form attributes, controlled value changes, and Field control data attributes without internal state.

items.name: base-ui-menu
items.title: Menu
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Menu primitive preserving model-owned open, submenu, highlighted, checked, and radio state, popup/menu ARIA, local keyboard navigation, typeahead, disabled items, grouping, separators, arrows, deterministic placement attributes, and dismiss events.

items.name: base-ui-menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Menubar primitive composed from the local Menu foundation, adding model-owned top-level menu selection, menubar root ARIA, horizontal and vertical trigger navigation, hover handoff while open, disabled propagation, and trigger roving focus metadata without duplicating Menu item, submenu, checkbox, radio, popup, or typeahead behavior.

items.name: base-ui-meter
items.title: Meter
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Meter primitive preserving root, label, track, indicator, value, ARIA, value clamping, range normalization, and formatting semantics.

items.name: base-ui-navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Navigation Menu primitive preserving model-owned value/open state, trigger/list keyboard navigation, link active state, portal, positioner, popup, viewport, content, icon, arrow, backdrop, transition, activation-direction, ARIA, and deterministic placement attributes.

items.name: base-ui-number-field
items.title: Number Field
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Number Field primitive preserving model-owned numeric/text state, deterministic parsing and formatting, clamping, stepping, keyboard increments, form value semantics, grouped controls, scrub parts, and origin data attributes.

items.name: base-ui-otp-field
items.title: OTP Field
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI OTP Field primitive preserving model-owned multi-slot value projection, normalization, paste/delete facts, focus handoff commands, hidden form input semantics, data attributes, and ARIA.

items.name: base-ui-popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Popover primitive preserving model-owned open state, trigger/open/close facts, deterministic modal and placement attributes, popup ARIA relationships, command-facing focus and scroll-lock helpers, backdrop, arrow, and title/description wiring.

items.name: base-ui-preview-card
items.title: Preview Card
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Preview Card primitive preserving model-owned open state, link trigger hover/focus/press facts, deterministic delay and placement attributes, portal, positioner, popup, viewport, arrow, backdrop, transition, detached-trigger, and keyboard-dismiss surfaces.

items.name: base-ui-progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Progress primitive preserving root, label, track, indicator, value, ARIA, state data attributes, value clamping, formatting, and indeterminate semantics.

items.name: base-ui-radio
items.title: Radio
items.description: Foldkit-native Base UI Radio primitive preserving controlled checked and unchecked states, root and indicator data attributes, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, Space keyup activation, Enter suppression, and native radio form controls without internal state.

files.content:
import { Option, Predicate, Schema as S } from 'effect'
import type { Attribute, Html } from 'foldkit/html'
import { html } from 'foldkit/html'

// MODEL

export const RadioCheckedState = S.Union([
  S.Literal('checked'),
  S.Literal('unchecked'),
])
export type RadioCheckedState = typeof RadioCheckedState.Type

export const RadioChangeReason = S.Literal('none')
export type RadioChangeReason = typeof RadioChangeReason.Type

export const RadioCheckedChange = S.Struct({
  checkedState: RadioCheckedState,
  reason: RadioChangeReason,
})
export type RadioCheckedChange = typeof RadioCheckedChange.Type

export const RadioOptions = S.Struct({
  id: S.optional(S.String),
  inputId: S.optional(S.String),
  name: S.optional(S.String),
  form: S.optional(S.String),
  value: S.optional(S.String),
  checkedState: RadioCheckedState,
  isDisabled: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isInvalid: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isRequired: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isReadOnly: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isValid: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isFieldInvalid: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isDirty: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isTouched: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isFilled: S.optional(S.Boolean),
  isFocused: S.optional(S.Boolean),
})
export type RadioOptions = typeof RadioOptions.Type

// UPDATE

export const isChecked = (checkedState: RadioCheckedState): boolean =>
  checkedState === 'checked'

export const checkedChange = (): RadioCheckedChange => ({
  checkedState: 'checked',
  reason: 'none',
})

// VIEW

export type RadioAttributes<Message> = Readonly<{
  root: ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>>
  indicator: ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>>
  input: ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>>
}>

export type ViewConfig<Message> = RadioOptions &
  Readonly<{
    toView: (attributes: RadioAttributes<Message>) => Html
    onCheckedChange?: (change: RadioCheckedChange) => Message
    onFocus?: Message
    onBlur?: Message
    keepIndicatorMounted?: boolean
  }>

const visuallyHiddenInputStyle =
  'clip-path: inset(50%); overflow: hidden; white-space: nowrap; border: 0px; padding: 0px; width: 1px; height: 1px; margin: -1px; position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px;'

const optionalAttribute = <Message>(
  value: string | undefined,
  toAttribute: (value: string) => Attribute<Message>,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> =>
  Predicate.isNotUndefined(value) ? [toAttribute(value)] : []

const optionalBooleanAttribute = <Message>(
  value: boolean | undefined,
  toAttribute: (value: boolean) => Attribute<Message>,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> =>
  value === true ? [toAttribute(true)] : []

const booleanDataAttribute = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  name: string,
  value: boolean | undefined,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> =>
  value === true ? [h.DataAttribute(name, '')] : []

const stateDataAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  config: Pick<
    RadioOptions,
    | 'checkedState'
    | 'isDirty'
    | 'isDisabled'
    | 'isFieldInvalid'
    | 'isFilled'
    | 'isFocused'
    | 'isReadOnly'
    | 'isRequired'
    | 'isTouched'
    | 'isValid'
  >,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> => [
  h.DataAttribute(config.checkedState, ''),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'disabled', config.isDisabled),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'readonly', config.isReadOnly),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'required', config.isRequired),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'valid', config.isValid),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'invalid', config.isFieldInvalid),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'dirty', config.isDirty),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'touched', config.isTouched),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'filled', config.isFilled),
  ...booleanDataAttribute(h, 'focused', config.isFocused),
]

const canActivate = (
  config: Pick<
    ViewConfig<unknown>,
    'checkedState' | 'isDisabled' | 'isReadOnly'
  >,
): boolean =>
  config.isDisabled !== true &&
  config.isReadOnly !== true &&
  !isChecked(config.checkedState)

const activationMessage = <Message>(
  config: Pick<
    ViewConfig<Message>,
    'checkedState' | 'isDisabled' | 'isReadOnly' | 'onCheckedChange'
  >,
): Option.Option<Message> =>
  Predicate.isNotUndefined(config.onCheckedChange) && canActivate(config)
    ? Option.some(config.onCheckedChange(checkedChange()))
    : Option.none()

const eventAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  config: ViewConfig<Message>,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> =>
  Option.match(activationMessage(config), {
    onNone: () => [h.OnKeyDownPreventDefault(() => Option.none())],
    onSome: message => [
      h.OnClick(message),
      h.OnKeyDownPreventDefault(() => Option.none()),
      h.OnKeyUpPreventDefault(key =>
        key === ' ' ? Option.some(message) : Option.none(),
      ),
    ],
  })

const focusAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  config: Pick<ViewConfig<Message>, 'onBlur' | 'onFocus'>,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> => [
  ...(Predicate.isNotUndefined(config.onFocus)
    ? [h.OnFocus(config.onFocus)]
    : []),
  ...(Predicate.isNotUndefined(config.onBlur) ? [h.OnBlur(config.onBlur)] : []),
]

const rootAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  config: ViewConfig<Message>,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> => [
  h.Role('radio'),
  h.AriaChecked(isChecked(config.checkedState)),
  h.Tabindex(config.isDisabled === true ? -1 : 0),
  ...optionalAttribute<Message>(config.id, value => h.Id(value)),
  ...(config.isDisabled === true ? [h.AriaDisabled(true)] : []),
  ...optionalBooleanAttribute<Message>(config.isReadOnly, value =>
    h.AriaReadonly(value),
  ),
  ...optionalBooleanAttribute<Message>(config.isRequired, value =>
    h.AriaRequired(value),
  ),
  ...(config.isInvalid === true ? [h.AriaInvalid(true)] : []),
  ...stateDataAttributes(h, config),
  ...eventAttributes(h, config),
  ...focusAttributes(h, config),
]

const inputValueAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  value: string | undefined,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> =>
  Predicate.isNotUndefined(value) ? [h.Value(value)] : []

const formOwnerAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  form: string | undefined,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> =>
  Predicate.isNotUndefined(form) ? [h.Attribute('form', form)] : []

const resolvedInputId = (
  config: Pick<RadioOptions, 'id' | 'inputId'>,
): string | undefined =>
  config.inputId ?? (config.id === undefined ? undefined : `${config.id}-input`)

const inputAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  config: ViewConfig<Message>,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> => [
  h.Type('radio'),
  h.AriaHidden(true),
  h.Tabindex(-1),
  h.Checked(isChecked(config.checkedState)),
  h.Attribute('style', visuallyHiddenInputStyle),
  ...optionalAttribute<Message>(resolvedInputId(config), value => h.Id(value)),
  ...optionalAttribute<Message>(config.name, value => h.Name(value)),
  ...formOwnerAttributes(h, config.form),
  ...inputValueAttributes(h, config.value),
  ...optionalBooleanAttribute<Message>(config.isDisabled, value =>
    h.Disabled(value),
  ),
  ...(config.isReadOnly === true ? [h.Attribute('readonly', '')] : []),
  ...optionalBooleanAttribute<Message>(config.isRequired, value =>
    h.Required(value),
  ),
  ...Option.match(activationMessage(config), {
    onNone: () => [],
    onSome: message => [h.OnClick(message)],
  }),
]

const indicatorAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  config: ViewConfig<Message>,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> =>
  config.keepIndicatorMounted === true || isChecked(config.checkedState)
    ? stateDataAttributes(h, config)
    : []

export const view = <Message>(config: ViewConfig<Message>): Html => {
  const h = html<Message>()

  return config.toView({
    root: rootAttributes(h, config),
    indicator: indicatorAttributes(h, config),
    input: inputAttributes(h, config),
  })
}

files.content:
import { Schema as S } from 'effect'
import type { Attribute, Html } from 'foldkit/html'
import { html } from 'foldkit/html'

import { cn } from '../utils/cn'
import * as BaseButton from '../base-ui/button'

// MODEL

export const ButtonVariant = S.Union([
  S.Literal('default'),
  S.Literal('outline'),
  S.Literal('secondary'),
  S.Literal('ghost'),
  S.Literal('destructive'),
  S.Literal('link'),
])
export type ButtonVariant = typeof ButtonVariant.Type

export const ButtonSize = S.Union([
  S.Literal('default'),
  S.Literal('xs'),
  S.Literal('sm'),
  S.Literal('lg'),
  S.Literal('icon'),
  S.Literal('icon-xs'),
  S.Literal('icon-sm'),
  S.Literal('icon-lg'),
])
export type ButtonSize = typeof ButtonSize.Type

export const buttonVariantValues: ReadonlyArray<ButtonVariant> = [
  'default',
  'outline',
  'secondary',
  'ghost',
  'destructive',
  'link',
]

export const buttonSizeValues: ReadonlyArray<ButtonSize> = [
  'default',
  'xs',
  'sm',
  'lg',
  'icon',
  'icon-xs',
  'icon-sm',
  'icon-lg',
]

export const ButtonStyleOptions = S.Struct({
  variant: S.optional(ButtonVariant),
  size: S.optional(ButtonSize),
  className: S.optional(S.String),
})
export type ButtonStyleOptions = typeof ButtonStyleOptions.Type

// VIEW

export type ButtonAttributes<Message> = BaseButton.ButtonAttributes<Message>

export type ViewConfig<Message> = Omit<
  BaseButton.ViewConfig<Message>,
  'toView'
> &
  ButtonStyleOptions &
  Readonly<{
    toView: (attributes: ButtonAttributes<Message>) => Html
  }>

export const baseClassName =
  "group/button inline-flex shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-transparent bg-clip-padding text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap transition-all outline-none select-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-3 focus-visible:ring-ring/50 active:not-aria-[haspopup]:translate-y-px disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 aria-invalid:border-destructive aria-invalid:ring-3 aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:border-destructive/50 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4"

export const variantClassNames: Readonly<Record<ButtonVariant, string>> = {
  default: 'bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/80',
  outline:
    'border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground aria-expanded:bg-muted aria-expanded:text-foreground dark:border-input dark:bg-input/30 dark:hover:bg-input/50',
  secondary:
    'bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-[color-mix(in_oklch,var(--secondary),var(--foreground)_5%)] aria-expanded:bg-secondary aria-expanded:text-secondary-foreground',
  ghost:
    'hover:bg-muted hover:text-foreground aria-expanded:bg-muted aria-expanded:text-foreground dark:hover:bg-muted/50',
  destructive:
    'bg-destructive/10 text-destructive hover:bg-destructive/20 focus-visible:border-destructive/40 focus-visible:ring-destructive/20 dark:bg-destructive/20 dark:hover:bg-destructive/30 dark:focus-visible:ring-destructive/40',
  link: 'text-primary underline-offset-4 hover:underline',
}

export const sizeClassNames: Readonly<Record<ButtonSize, string>> = {
  default:
    'h-8 gap-1.5 px-2.5 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-2 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-2',
  xs: "h-6 gap-1 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)] px-2 text-xs in-data-[slot=button-group]:rounded-lg has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1.5 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
  sm: "h-7 gap-1 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),12px)] px-2.5 text-[0.8rem] in-data-[slot=button-group]:rounded-lg has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-1.5 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-1.5 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3.5",
  lg: 'h-9 gap-1.5 px-2.5 has-data-[icon=inline-end]:pr-2 has-data-[icon=inline-start]:pl-2',
  icon: 'size-8',
  'icon-xs':
    "size-6 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10px)] in-data-[slot=button-group]:rounded-lg [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-3",
  'icon-sm':
    'size-7 rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),12px)] in-data-[slot=button-group]:rounded-lg',
  'icon-lg': 'size-9',
}

export const buttonVariants = ({
  variant = 'default',
  size = 'default',
  className,
}: ButtonStyleOptions = {}): string => {
  const extraClassName = className === undefined ? '' : cn(className)

  return [
    baseClassName,
    variantClassNames[variant],
    sizeClassNames[size],
    extraClassName,
  ]
    .filter(Boolean)
    .join(' ')
}

const shadcnAttributes = <Message>(
  h: ReturnType<typeof html<Message>>,
  variant: ButtonVariant,
  size: ButtonSize,
  className: string | undefined,
): ReadonlyArray<Attribute<Message>> => [
  h.DataAttribute('slot', 'button'),
  h.Class(cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))),
]

export const view = <Message>(config: ViewConfig<Message>): Html => {
  const h = html<Message>()

  const {
    toView,
    variant = 'default',
    size = 'default',
    className,
    ...baseConfig
  } = config

  return BaseButton.view<Message>({
    ...baseConfig,
    toView: attributes =>
      toView({
        button: [
          ...attributes.button,
          ...shadcnAttributes(h, variant, size, className),
        ],
      }),
  })
}

export const linkClassName = (options: ButtonStyleOptions = {}): string =>
  buttonVariants({
    ...options,
    variant: options.variant ?? 'link',
  })

items.name: utils-cn

files.content:
import { clsx } from 'clsx'
import type { ClassValue } from 'clsx'
import { twMerge } from 'tailwind-merge'

export const cn = (...inputs: ReadonlyArray<ClassValue>): string =>
  twMerge(clsx(...inputs))
